name: skill-drift-audit-skill
description: Audit repo-local SKILL.md files against docs, scripts, examples, and release notes.

scripts.smoke: node bin/skill-drift-audit.js scan fixtures/stale-skill --format markdown && node bin/skill-drift-audit.js plan fixtures/stale-skill --output tmp/stale-plan.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
